name: Italian Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
Italian dressing mix: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl, stirring until evenly distributed. Pour into a 1/4-cup container with a tight-fitting lid or wrap airtight in heavy-duty foil. Seal the container. Label with date and contents. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 months. Makes 1 package or about 4 tablespoons Italian Dressing Mix.
Italian salad dressing: In a small bowl or salad dressing cruet, combine Italian Salad Dressing Mix, vinegar and oil. Stir or shake until blended. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving. Yield: About 1 cup.
